name: @ont/wallet
description: ONT B5 surface — the wallet (clean-build). The ONE surface that owns key material + signing (the only boundary-lint crypto-exempt surface). Exposes a narrow WalletSigner contract the CLI/claim DELEGATE to; consumes the B4/B5 adapters for all rules (re-encodes no consensus/transfer/auction logic). See docs/core/B5_WALLET_CLASSIFICATION.md.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-resolver && vitest run
